author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

A lot of you have been asking “Wen Town Hall. Why no Town Hall?!”, and rightfully so, Town Halls are an extremely important part of our community. 

Well… see you this Friday, because we have a Town Hall INCOMING.

We'll have:   

 Updates from CEO Michael Wagner
 Chat with Star Atlas Blockchain Architect
 EXCLUSIVE content dropping right here in our Discord
After-party on Twitter Spaces: https://twitter.com/i/spaces/1vAxRAlQeDVJl

 Friday, October 28, 4pm EST / 20:00 UTC
